---
title: "Executive Briefs"
subtitle: "Single-page leadership summaries of UIAO capability areas"
doc-type: landing
canon-source: "src/uiao/canon/"
derived-from: "uiao canon"
aspirational: true
---

::: {.callout-important title="Content pending"}
This section is part of the customer-documents skeleton but has not yet been
authored. The page slugs below are reserved; content will land in line with
the [Customer Documents Roadmap](../ROADMAP.qmd).
:::

Executive Briefs are single-page summaries for agency CIO / CISO audiences.
Each covers one capability area: what it is, why it matters, what UIAO
delivers, and what is still target vs. shipped.

## Planned pages

| Slug | Topic | Canon anchor |
|---|---|---|
| `drift-engine-overview.md` | Drift-detection capability brief | `docs/docs/16_DriftDetectionStandard.qmd` |
| `evidence-fabric-overview.md` | Provenance and evidence pipeline brief | `docs/docs/15_ProvenanceProfile.qmd` |
| `governance-os-overview.md` | Canon-anchored governance substrate brief | `src/uiao/canon/substrate-manifest.yaml` |
| `modernization-overview.md` | End-to-end modernization program brief | `docs/docs/06_ProgramVision.qmd` |
